records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't answer, so I was a bit worried. Still in your room, I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't answer, so I was a bit worried. Still in your room, I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't answer, so I was a bit worried. Still in your room, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even writing something? That's not like you. Is something wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even writing something? That's not like you. Is something wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even writing something? That's not like you. Is something wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just reviewing the current situation and jotting down some useful tactics.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just reviewing the current situation and jotting down some useful tactics.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just reviewing the current situation and jotting down some useful tactics.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a brief draft of strategies, but if it's Allen, even this should come in handy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a brief draft of strategies, but if it's Allen, even this should come in handy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a brief draft of strategies, but if it's Allen, even this should come in handy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think so? You trained him so strictly,
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think so? You trained him so strictly,
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think so? You trained him so strictly,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that he still turns pale at the sight of a strategy manual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: that he still turns pale at the sight of a strategy manual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: that he still turns pale at the sight of a strategy manual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing's more important in war than sound tactics. And it wasn't strictness, it was love.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing's more important in war than sound tactics. And it wasn't strictness, it was love.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing's more important in war than sound tactics. And it wasn't strictness, it was love.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Rougi959 needs a devoted wife like me to truly understand... A shame, really.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Rougi959 needs a devoted wife like me to truly understand... A shame, really.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Rougi959 needs a devoted wife like me to truly understand... A shame, really.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you dying or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you dying or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you dying or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, in fact. This isn't a strategy book. It's my will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, in fact. This isn't a strategy book. It's my will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, in fact. This isn't a strategy book. It's my will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was just writing a request to have Sir Rougi959 dismissed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was just writing a request to have Sir Rougi959 dismissed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was just writing a request to have Sir Rougi959 dismissed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even your final moments are dramatic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even your final moments are dramatic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even your final moments are dramatic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I'm joking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I'm joking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I'm joking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I really were dying, I'd want to peacefully go somewhere my beloved prepared for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I really were dying, I'd want to peacefully go somewhere my beloved prepared for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I really were dying, I'd want to peacefully go somewhere my beloved prepared for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're planning to ask the captain for a gravestone on your birthday?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're planning to ask the captain for a gravestone on your birthday?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're planning to ask the captain for a gravestone on your birthday?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that a romantic gesture? I'll think about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that a romantic gesture? I'll think about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that a romantic gesture? I'll think about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine, just don't tell anyone it was my idea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine, just don't tell anyone it was my idea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine, just don't tell anyone it was my idea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-enough joking. Let's get back to business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-enough joking. Let's get back to business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-enough joking. Let's get back to business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How did the preparations go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How did the preparations go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How did the preparations go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The expedition is assembled, minus the troops staying to defend the County.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The expedition is assembled, minus the troops staying to defend the County.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The expedition is assembled, minus the troops staying to defend the County.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once the remaining Virgo Armament is complete, we'll have all twelve chosen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once the remaining Virgo Armament is complete, we'll have all twelve chosen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once the remaining Virgo Armament is complete, we'll have all twelve chosen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The succession ceremony the Empire's people have long awaited can finally begin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The succession ceremony the Empire's people have long awaited can finally begin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The succession ceremony the Empire's people have long awaited can finally begin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. It can.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. It can.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. It can.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be leaving soon. Sir Rougi959, I'm entrusting the remaining knights to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be leaving soon. Sir Rougi959, I'm entrusting the remaining knights to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be leaving soon. Sir Rougi959, I'm entrusting the remaining knights to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Rougi959, one more thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Rougi959, one more thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Rougi959, one more thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's nothing big. Just... thank you. For everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's nothing big. Just... thank you. For everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's nothing big. Just... thank you. For everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Are you sure you're not dying?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Are you sure you're not dying?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Are you sure you're not dying?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's harsh. I'm telling Allen when he gets back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's harsh. I'm telling Allen when he gets back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's harsh. I'm telling Allen when he gets back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did I do?! You're making me the bad guy again!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did I do?! You're making me the bad guy again!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did I do?! You're making me the bad guy again!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm teasing. Please take care of the County while I'm gone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm teasing. Please take care of the County while I'm gone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm teasing. Please take care of the County while I'm gone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've seen so many people consumed by greed. But in the face of death, I'm just human too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've seen so many people consumed by greed. But in the face of death, I'm just human too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've seen so many people consumed by greed. But in the face of death, I'm just human too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this is the starlight of my final hour, I hope I at least dream of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this is the starlight of my final hour, I hope I at least dream of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this is the starlight of my final hour, I hope I at least dream of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strange, I miss you today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strange, I miss you today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strange, I miss you today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Allen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Allen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Allen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am. I'm ready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am. I'm ready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am. I'm ready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where should I go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where should I go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where should I go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please wait a moment. I'll take you myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please wait a moment. I'll take you myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please wait a moment. I'll take you myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good morning, Esther. Did you sleep well?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good morning, Esther. Did you sleep well?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good morning, Esther. Did you sleep well?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...There was a bird onesie by my pillow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...There was a bird onesie by my pillow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...There was a bird onesie by my pillow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That bird is called a pink robin. You reminded me of one in that robe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That bird is called a pink robin. You reminded me of one in that robe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That bird is called a pink robin. You reminded me of one in that robe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had it made overnight by the court tailor. What did you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had it made overnight by the court tailor. What did you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had it made overnight by the court tailor. What did you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't wear it... so I'm not sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't wear it... so I'm not sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't wear it... so I'm not sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Next time, I'll consider your taste more carefully.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Next time, I'll consider your taste more carefully.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Next time, I'll consider your taste more carefully.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Countess has arrived! All units, form up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Countess has arrived! All units, form up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Countess has arrived! All units, form up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Expedition preparations complete, Countess!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Expedition preparations complete, Countess!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Expedition preparations complete, Countess!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even knowing it's an expedition, this is quite the force.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even knowing it's an expedition, this is quite the force.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even knowing it's an expedition, this is quite the force.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There must be tens of thousands here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There must be tens of thousands here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There must be tens of thousands here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For something this important, it's still not enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For something this important, it's still not enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For something this important, it's still not enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wish we could wait for the others who left earlier, but we're out of time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wish we could wait for the others who left earlier, but we're out of time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wish we could wait for the others who left earlier, but we're out of time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Countess Birmingham, the soldiers await your command.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Countess Birmingham, the soldiers await your command.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Countess Birmingham, the soldiers await your command.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Ferron. From this point forward, we march as knights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Ferron. From this point forward, we march as knights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Ferron. From this point forward, we march as knights.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I ask for your respect, even if I fall short. I'm one of you, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I ask for your respect, even if I fall short. I'm one of you, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I ask for your respect, even if I fall short. I'm one of you, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Forgive me, Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Forgive me, Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Forgive me, Dame Grace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, your orders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, your orders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, your orders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knights from the eight continents that burned.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knights from the eight continents that burned.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knights from the eight continents that burned.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are all failures.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are all failures.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are all failures.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Silence. The Countess is speaking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Silence. The Countess is speaking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Silence. The Countess is speaking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some of you lost your families to overwhelming force. Some fled your homes in fear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some of you lost your families to overwhelming force. Some fled your homes in fear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some of you lost your families to overwhelming force. Some fled your homes in fear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some couldn't bear your own weakness and pushed others away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some couldn't bear your own weakness and pushed others away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some couldn't bear your own weakness and pushed others away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While the eight continents burned, you stood by and did nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While the eight continents burned, you stood by and did nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While the eight continents burned, you stood by and did nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And now, while others fight and die, you sit safely here in the County.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And now, while others fight and die, you sit safely here in the County.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And now, while others fight and die, you sit safely here in the County.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you remember last?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you remember last?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you remember last?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was it the peaceful County, untouched by war and famine?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was it the peaceful County, untouched by war and famine?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was it the peaceful County, untouched by war and famine?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or was it the battlefield, where your comrades and loved ones screamed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or was it the battlefield, where your comrades and loved ones screamed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or was it the battlefield, where your comrades and loved ones screamed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the first time in two centuries, the world's chosen savior stands before us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the first time in two centuries, the world's chosen savior stands before us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the first time in two centuries, the world's chosen savior stands before us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But he won't protect you from death. He's here to save the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But he won't protect you from death. He's here to save the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But he won't protect you from death. He's here to save the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will you let the starlight of hope your fallen comrades left behind...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will you let the starlight of hope your fallen comrades left behind...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will you let the starlight of hope your fallen comrades left behind...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be trampled as the price of that salvation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be trampled as the price of that salvation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be trampled as the price of that salvation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't say something naive like, "Let's all come back alive."
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't say something naive like, "Let's all come back alive."
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't say something naive like, "Let's all come back alive."

records.m_Talk_ENG: But to honor those who've already fallen...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But to honor those who've already fallen...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But to honor those who've already fallen...

records.m_Talk_ENG: To etch justice into their path...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To etch justice into their path...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To etch justice into their path...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lend me your strength.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lend me your strength.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lend me your strength.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First captain, Dylan. I will follow Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First captain, Dylan. I will follow Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First captain, Dylan. I will follow Dame Grace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Second captain, William. I will follow Dame Grace!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Second captain, William. I will follow Dame Grace!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Second captain, William. I will follow Dame Grace!

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the Empire's peace, I will follow Dame Grace!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the Empire's peace, I will follow Dame Grace!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the Empire's peace, I will follow Dame Grace!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You look confused.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You look confused.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You look confused.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must look ridiculous. Ragtag knights pretending we belong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must look ridiculous. Ragtag knights pretending we belong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must look ridiculous. Ragtag knights pretending we belong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I gave that impression, I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I gave that impression, I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I gave that impression, I'm sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just... amazed so many would entrust their lives to her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just... amazed so many would entrust their lives to her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just... amazed so many would entrust their lives to her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: These knights came from the eight scorched continents.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These knights came from the eight scorched continents.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These knights came from the eight scorched continents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We should have died on the battlefield, but we ran in fear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We should have died on the battlefield, but we ran in fear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We should have died on the battlefield, but we ran in fear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Too lacking in talent to join the Knights of Redemption, too weak to stand our ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Too lacking in talent to join the Knights of Redemption, too weak to stand our ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Too lacking in talent to join the Knights of Redemption, too weak to stand our ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not my place, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not my place, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not my place, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Facing your own weakness takes real courage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Facing your own weakness takes real courage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Facing your own weakness takes real courage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That alone proves you're not weak, Sir Ferron.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That alone proves you're not weak, Sir Ferron.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That alone proves you're not weak, Sir Ferron.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. Dame Grace said the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. Dame Grace said the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. Dame Grace said the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She gave us weapons when we had nothing left. She taught us to fight and gave us courage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She gave us weapons when we had nothing left. She taught us to fight and gave us courage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She gave us weapons when we had nothing left. She taught us to fight and gave us courage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That alone was more than enough to earn our loyalty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That alone was more than enough to earn our loyalty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That alone was more than enough to earn our loyalty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She chose to carry the burden of our broken lives with us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She chose to carry the burden of our broken lives with us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She chose to carry the burden of our broken lives with us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: General Ferron. No matter what darkness we face...
records.m_Talk_DEU: General Ferron. No matter what darkness we face...
records.m_Talk_FRA: General Ferron. No matter what darkness we face...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We swear to fulfill the mission we've been given.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We swear to fulfill the mission we've been given.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We swear to fulfill the mission we've been given.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As heir to House Birmingham, I place your lives on the line to fulfill my duty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As heir to House Birmingham, I place your lives on the line to fulfill my duty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As heir to House Birmingham, I place your lives on the line to fulfill my duty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let this <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let this <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let this <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be what saves us all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be what saves us all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be what saves us all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't answer, so I was a bit worried. Still in your room, I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't answer, so I was a bit worried. Still in your room, I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't answer, so I was a bit worried. Still in your room, I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that a romantic gesture? I'll think about it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fine, just don't tell anyone it was my idea.

root.m_Talk_FRA: How did the preparations go?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The expedition is assembled, minus the troops staying to defend the County.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The expedition is assembled, minus the troops staying to defend the County.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The expedition is assembled, minus the troops staying to defend the County.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once the remaining Virgo Armament is complete, we'll have all twelve chosen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once the remaining Virgo Armament is complete, we'll have all twelve chosen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once the remaining Virgo Armament is complete, we'll have all twelve chosen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The succession ceremony the Empire's people have long awaited can finally begin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The succession ceremony the Empire's people have long awaited can finally begin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The succession ceremony the Empire's people have long awaited can finally begin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. It can.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. It can.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. It can.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be leaving soon. Sir Rougi959, I'm entrusting the remaining knights to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be leaving soon. Sir Rougi959, I'm entrusting the remaining knights to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be leaving soon. Sir Rougi959, I'm entrusting the remaining knights to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Rougi959, one more thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Rougi959, one more thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Rougi959, one more thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's nothing big. Just... thank you. For everything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's nothing big. Just... thank you. For everything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's nothing big. Just... thank you. For everything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Are you sure you're not dying?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Are you sure you're not dying?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Are you sure you're not dying?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's harsh. I'm telling Allen when he gets back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's harsh. I'm telling Allen when he gets back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's harsh. I'm telling Allen when he gets back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did I do?! You're making me the bad guy again!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did I do?! You're making me the bad guy again!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did I do?! You're making me the bad guy again!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm teasing. Please take care of the County while I'm gone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm teasing. Please take care of the County while I'm gone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm teasing. Please take care of the County while I'm gone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've seen so many people consumed by greed. But in the face of death, I'm just human too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've seen so many people consumed by greed. But in the face of death, I'm just human too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've seen so many people consumed by greed. But in the face of death, I'm just human too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If this is the starlight of my final hour, I hope I at least dream of you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If this is the starlight of my final hour, I hope I at least dream of you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If this is the starlight of my final hour, I hope I at least dream of you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Strange, I miss you today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Strange, I miss you today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Strange, I miss you today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Allen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Allen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Allen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am. I'm ready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am. I'm ready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am. I'm ready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where should I go?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where should I go?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where should I go?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please wait a moment. I'll take you myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please wait a moment. I'll take you myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please wait a moment. I'll take you myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good morning, Esther. Did you sleep well?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good morning, Esther. Did you sleep well?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good morning, Esther. Did you sleep well?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...There was a bird onesie by my pillow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...There was a bird onesie by my pillow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...There was a bird onesie by my pillow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That bird is called a pink robin. You reminded me of one in that robe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That bird is called a pink robin. You reminded me of one in that robe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That bird is called a pink robin. You reminded me of one in that robe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had it made overnight by the court tailor. What did you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had it made overnight by the court tailor. What did you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had it made overnight by the court tailor. What did you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't wear it... so I'm not sure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't wear it... so I'm not sure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't wear it... so I'm not sure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, is that so?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, is that so?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, is that so?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Next time, I'll consider your taste more carefully.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Next time, I'll consider your taste more carefully.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Next time, I'll consider your taste more carefully.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Countess has arrived! All units, form up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Countess has arrived! All units, form up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Countess has arrived! All units, form up!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Expedition preparations complete, Countess!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Expedition preparations complete, Countess!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Expedition preparations complete, Countess!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even knowing it's an expedition, this is quite the force.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even knowing it's an expedition, this is quite the force.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even knowing it's an expedition, this is quite the force.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There must be tens of thousands here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There must be tens of thousands here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There must be tens of thousands here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For something this important, it's still not enough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For something this important, it's still not enough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For something this important, it's still not enough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wish we could wait for the others who left earlier, but we're out of time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wish we could wait for the others who left earlier, but we're out of time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wish we could wait for the others who left earlier, but we're out of time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Countess Birmingham, the soldiers await your command.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Countess Birmingham, the soldiers await your command.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Countess Birmingham, the soldiers await your command.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Ferron. From this point forward, we march as knights.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Ferron. From this point forward, we march as knights.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Ferron. From this point forward, we march as knights.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I ask for your respect, even if I fall short. I'm one of you, after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I ask for your respect, even if I fall short. I'm one of you, after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I ask for your respect, even if I fall short. I'm one of you, after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Forgive me, Dame Grace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Forgive me, Dame Grace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Forgive me, Dame Grace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, your orders.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, your orders.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, your orders.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Knights from the eight continents that burned.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Knights from the eight continents that burned.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Knights from the eight continents that burned.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are all failures.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are all failures.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are all failures.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Silence. The Countess is speaking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Silence. The Countess is speaking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Silence. The Countess is speaking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Some of you lost your families to overwhelming force. Some fled your homes in fear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Some of you lost your families to overwhelming force. Some fled your homes in fear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Some of you lost your families to overwhelming force. Some fled your homes in fear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Some couldn't bear your own weakness and pushed others away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Some couldn't bear your own weakness and pushed others away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Some couldn't bear your own weakness and pushed others away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: While the eight continents burned, you stood by and did nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: While the eight continents burned, you stood by and did nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: While the eight continents burned, you stood by and did nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And now, while others fight and die, you sit safely here in the County.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And now, while others fight and die, you sit safely here in the County.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And now, while others fight and die, you sit safely here in the County.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you remember last?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you remember last?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you remember last?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Was it the peaceful County, untouched by war and famine?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Was it the peaceful County, untouched by war and famine?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Was it the peaceful County, untouched by war and famine?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or was it the battlefield, where your comrades and loved ones screamed?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or was it the battlefield, where your comrades and loved ones screamed?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or was it the battlefield, where your comrades and loved ones screamed?

root.m_Talk_ENG: For the first time in two centuries, the world's chosen savior stands before us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For the first time in two centuries, the world's chosen savior stands before us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For the first time in two centuries, the world's chosen savior stands before us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But he won't protect you from death. He's here to save the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But he won't protect you from death. He's here to save the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But he won't protect you from death. He's here to save the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will you let the starlight of hope your fallen comrades left behind...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will you let the starlight of hope your fallen comrades left behind...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will you let the starlight of hope your fallen comrades left behind...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Be trampled as the price of that salvation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Be trampled as the price of that salvation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Be trampled as the price of that salvation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't say something naive like, "Let's all come back alive."
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't say something naive like, "Let's all come back alive."
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't say something naive like, "Let's all come back alive."

root.m_Talk_ENG: But to honor those who've already fallen...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But to honor those who've already fallen...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But to honor those who've already fallen...

root.m_Talk_ENG: To etch justice into their path...
root.m_Talk_DEU: To etch justice into their path...
root.m_Talk_FRA: To etch justice into their path...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lend me your strength.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lend me your strength.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lend me your strength.

root.m_Talk_ENG: First captain, Dylan. I will follow Dame Grace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: First captain, Dylan. I will follow Dame Grace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: First captain, Dylan. I will follow Dame Grace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Second captain, William. I will follow Dame Grace!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Second captain, William. I will follow Dame Grace!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Second captain, William. I will follow Dame Grace!

root.m_Talk_ENG: For the Empire's peace, I will follow Dame Grace!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: For the Empire's peace, I will follow Dame Grace!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: For the Empire's peace, I will follow Dame Grace!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You look confused.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You look confused.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You look confused.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We must look ridiculous. Ragtag knights pretending we belong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We must look ridiculous. Ragtag knights pretending we belong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We must look ridiculous. Ragtag knights pretending we belong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I gave that impression, I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I gave that impression, I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I gave that impression, I'm sorry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just... amazed so many would entrust their lives to her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just... amazed so many would entrust their lives to her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just... amazed so many would entrust their lives to her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: These knights came from the eight scorched continents.
root.m_Talk_DEU: These knights came from the eight scorched continents.
root.m_Talk_FRA: These knights came from the eight scorched continents.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We should have died on the battlefield, but we ran in fear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We should have died on the battlefield, but we ran in fear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We should have died on the battlefield, but we ran in fear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Too lacking in talent to join the Knights of Redemption, too weak to stand our ground.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Too lacking in talent to join the Knights of Redemption, too weak to stand our ground.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Too lacking in talent to join the Knights of Redemption, too weak to stand our ground.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not my place, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not my place, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not my place, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Facing your own weakness takes real courage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Facing your own weakness takes real courage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Facing your own weakness takes real courage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That alone proves you're not weak, Sir Ferron.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That alone proves you're not weak, Sir Ferron.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That alone proves you're not weak, Sir Ferron.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. Dame Grace said the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. Dame Grace said the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. Dame Grace said the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She gave us weapons when we had nothing left. She taught us to fight and gave us courage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She gave us weapons when we had nothing left. She taught us to fight and gave us courage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She gave us weapons when we had nothing left. She taught us to fight and gave us courage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That alone was more than enough to earn our loyalty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That alone was more than enough to earn our loyalty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That alone was more than enough to earn our loyalty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She chose to carry the burden of our broken lives with us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She chose to carry the burden of our broken lives with us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She chose to carry the burden of our broken lives with us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: General Ferron. No matter what darkness we face...
root.m_Talk_DEU: General Ferron. No matter what darkness we face...
root.m_Talk_FRA: General Ferron. No matter what darkness we face...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We swear to fulfill the mission we've been given.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We swear to fulfill the mission we've been given.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We swear to fulfill the mission we've been given.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As heir to House Birmingham, I place your lives on the line to fulfill my duty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As heir to House Birmingham, I place your lives on the line to fulfill my duty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As heir to House Birmingham, I place your lives on the line to fulfill my duty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let this <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let this <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let this <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Be what saves us all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Be what saves us all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Be what saves us all.
